mock_disclaimer: MOCK CONTRACT-TEST CELLS — not real population data; do not aggregate or interpret demographically.
description: Bridge harness proving the survey-mapper-backed pipeline can produce rows conforming to syntheticElectorateContract. NOT a real VEP universe; NOT a vote prediction; NOT abstention calibration. Cells are hand-authored fixtures (mockVepUniverse.ts).

aggregate_checks.label: All 5 mock years represented (file loaded for each)

provenance.notes: v0: ideological position from issue items deferred (CC*_337_*, CC*_415r etc.)
v0: ideological position from issue items deferred (abortion / LGBT / religion items)
v0: ideological position from issue items deferred (immigration battery)
v0: universal-moral-circle position from issue items deferred (refugees, foreign aid)
v0: PRO low survey coverage; fallback per spec
v0: COM weakest-covered continuous node; fallback per spec
v0: ZS from issue items deferred (trade, immigration takes jobs)
v0: ONT_H requires Feldman-Stenner battery (ANES-only); CCES has no signal
v0: ONT_S from trust-in-institutions battery deferred (V162310 etc.)
v0 uses spec broad EPS prior; year-specific issue items deferred to v1
v0 outputs uniform AES — surveys do not directly probe aesthetic preference
v0: no per-year national-pride / immigration-restrictiveness item parsed
v0: no per-year race-policy / thermometer items parsed
pew_churatd / pew_bornagain missing
union missing or skipped
ideo5 missing or skipped
v0: no per-year gender-policy / thermometer items parsed
pid7 missing or skipped

notes: mock-bridge: signature imputed from donor respondent 46 (year 2008)

invariant_checks.label: 2008: ≥ 5 rows produced
2008: every row validates per validateSyntheticElectorateRow

2008: every row has finite, positive cellWeight

2008: total mock weight finite and positive
2008: no vote-prediction / abstention-calibration / candidate-distance / real-VEP-claim keys present
